lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਕਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਲਾਵ ਪਹਿਲੀ ਆਰੰਭੁ ਕਾਜੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan kahai naanak laav pahilee aaranbh kaaj rachaaeaa |1|
lines.english: Servant Nanak proclaims that, in this, the first round of the marriage ceremony, the marriage ceremony has begun. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦੂਜੜੀ ਲਾਵ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har doojarree laav satigur purakh milaaeaa bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: In the second round of the marriage ceremony, the Lord leads you to meet the True Guru, the Primal Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਭੈ ਮਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: nirbhau bhai man hoe haumai mail gavaaeaa bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: With the Fear of God, the Fearless Lord in the mind, the filth of egotism is eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਸਾਰਿਆ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਰਬ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har aatam raam pasaariaa suaamee sarab rahiaa bharapoore |
lines.english: The Lord, the Supreme Soul, is the Lord and Master of the Universe; He is pervading and permeating everywhere, fully filling all spaces.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਭਉ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਰਾਮੁ ਹਦੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: niramal bhau paaeaa har gun gaaeaa har vekhai raam hadoore |
lines.english: In the Fear of God, the Immaculate Lord, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and behold the Lord's Presence before you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੋ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਮੰਗਲ ਗਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: antar baahar har prabh eko mil har jan mangal gaae |
lines.english: Deep within, and outside as well, there is only the One Lord God. Meeting together, the humble servants of the Lord sing the songs of joy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੂਜੀ ਲਾਵ ਚਲਾਈ ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦ ਵਜਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak doojee laav chalaaee anahad sabad vajaae |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak proclaims that, in this, the second round of the marriage ceremony, the unstruck sound current of the Shabad resounds. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤੀਜੜੀ ਲਾਵ ਮਨਿ ਚਾਉ ਭਇਆ ਬੈਰਾਗੀਆ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har teejarree laav man chaau bheaa bairaageea bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: In the third round of the marriage ceremony, the mind is filled with Divine Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਵਡਭਾਗੀਆ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa har mel har paaeaa vaddabhaageea bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: Meeting with the humble Saints of the Lord, I have found the Lord, by great good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਕਥੀਐ ਅਕਥ ਕਹਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa vaddabhaagee paaeaa har katheeai akath kahaanee |
lines.english: By great good fortune, I have found the humble Saints, and I speak the Unspoken Speech of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ਮੁਖਿ ਬੋਲੀ ਹਰਿ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: niramal har paaeaa har gun gaaeaa mukh bolee har baanee |
lines.english: I have found the Immaculate Lord, and I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. I speak the Word of the Lord's Bani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਬੋਲੇ ਤੀਜੀ ਲਾਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਮਨਿ ਬੈਰਾਗੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jan naanak bole teejee laavai har upajai man bairaag jeeo |3|
lines.english: Servant Nanak proclaims that, in this, the third round of the marriage ceremony, the mind is filled with Divine Love for the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਜੀ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੀਐ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai har har har dhun upajee har japeeai masatak bhaag jeeo |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, Har, vibrates and resounds within my heart; meditating on the Lord, I have realized the destiny inscribed upon my forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਉਥੜੀ ਲਾਵ ਮਨਿ ਸਹਜੁ ਭਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har chautharree laav man sehaj bheaa har paaeaa bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: In the fourth round of the marriage ceremony, my mind has become peaceful; I have found the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸੁਭਾਇ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਮੀਠਾ ਲਾਇਆ ਬਲਿ ਰਾਮ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh miliaa subhaae har man tan meetthaa laaeaa bal raam jeeo |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, I have met Him, with intuitive ease; the Lord seems so sweet to my mind and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੀਠਾ ਲਾਇਆ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਇਆ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har meetthaa laaeaa mere prabh bhaaeaa anadin har liv laaee |
lines.english: The Lord seems so sweet; I am pleasing to my God. Night and day, I lovingly focus my consciousness on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਚਿੰਦਿਆ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਜੀ ਵਾਧਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: man chindiaa fal paaeaa suaamee har naam vajee vaadhaaee |
lines.english: I have obtained my Lord and Master, the fruit of my mind's desires. The Lord's Name resounds and resonates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਠਾਕੁਰਿ ਕਾਜੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ਧਨ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਿਗਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: har prabh tthaakur kaaj rachaaeaa dhan hiradai naam vigaasee |
lines.english: The Lord God, my Lord and Master, blends with His bride, and her heart blossoms forth in the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਬੋਲੇ ਚਉਥੀ ਲਾਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਵਿਨਾਸੀ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak bole chauthee laavai har paaeaa prabh avinaasee |4|2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak proclaims that, in this, the fourth round of the marriage ceremony, we have found the Eternal Lord God. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਛੰਤ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: raag soohee chhant mahalaa 4 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Raag Soohee, Chhant, Fourth Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh har gun gaae |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai rasan rasaae |
lines.english: in their hearts, and on their tongues, they enjoy and savor His taste.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਾਏ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਏ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har rasan rasaae mere prabh bhaae miliaa sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: They enjoy and savor His taste, and are pleasing to my God, who meets them with natural ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: vaddai bhaag gur pooraa paaeeai anadin naam dhiaae |
lines.english: By great good fortune, one obtains the Perfect Guru; night and day, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭੋਗ ਭੋਗੇ ਸੁਖਿ ਸੋਵੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: anadin bhog bhoge sukh sovai sabad rahai liv laae |
lines.english: Night and day, they enjoy enjoyments, and they sleep in peace; they remain lovingly absorbed in the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁੰਨਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sahaje sehaj miliaa jagajeevan naanak sun samaae |1|
lines.english: In absolute ease and poise, one meets the Life of the World. O Nanak, one is absorbed in the state of absolute absorption. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲਿ ਨਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har sar niramal naae |
lines.english: I bathe in the Immaculate Pool of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲਿ ਜਲਿ ਨਾਏ ਮੈਲੁ ਗਵਾਏ ਭਏ ਪਵਿਤੁ ਸਰੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: niramal jal naae mail gavaae bhe pavit sareeraa |
lines.english: Bathing in these Immaculate Waters, my filth is removed, and my body is purified and sanctified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸੰਤ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sangat sant milaae |
lines.english: Joining the Society of the Saints,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਗਈ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਾਗਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਬਿਨਠੀ ਪੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: duramat mail gee bhram bhaagaa haumai binatthee peeraa |
lines.english: The filth of intellectual evil-mindedness is removed, doubt is gone, and the pain of egotism is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਹੋਆ ਵਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: nadar prabhoo satasangat paaee nij ghar hoaa vaasaa |
lines.english: By God's Grace, I found the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation. I dwell in the home of my own inner being.
